name: Velliv | Believe

“And... if you need to lean on someone, I’m here. Don’t try to shoulder everything alone.”
VellivVellivVellivBeliev

The moment i saw her again at Masses Travels i really liked the art and went to edit the image to this like mirrored 4 way? In a way i saw it as it all goes back to Velliv the comforter or....mommy. Now the title "Believe" just sounded right here. Theres two messages, both are fluff. Might do Exusiai alter and the Lemon. I'm not sure who to credit so its just Hypergryph.
Im up for reviews!

Reporting out!
